ksa_text: Design and maintain the analytics transformation layer, including staging models, intermediate transformations, conformed dimensions, fact tables, and consumption-ready data mart models for BI and analytics.

Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4385, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
